channel.title: Axiom AI blog
channel.description: News, deep dives and the life of the Axiom AI project.

item.title: What we took from Hindsight
item.description: Axiom's memory got a serious rework, inspired by an open-source project called Hindsight. / NPCs can now keep facts, form opinions that shift over time, and hold a living profile of who they are. / It's all optional, and the offline mode that never touches an AI still works exactly like before.

item.title: Axiom has a blog now
item.description: We finally have a real place to talk about the project, not just a dry changelog. / Expect deep dives, the thinking behind the big changes, and the messes we walk into. / There's an RSS feed too, so you can follow along without ever opening the site.
